name: apptor-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for the apptor ecosystem — apptorID authentication and more

plugins.name: apptorID
plugins.description: Integrate apptorID (OAuth2/OIDC) authentication into any application. Explores your codebase, provisions resources via MCP, writes all integration code, and tests it.

plugins.name: expeed-review-protocol
plugins.description: Mandatory three-tier review gate for Expeed repos. Blocks 'done' and 'git push' until the tier-appropriate checklist (L1 code review, smoke test, cross-layer contract check, adversarial review, Tier 3 runbook/rollback) is filled with real evidence. Catches the 'reviewed per-layer, never booted' failure mode.
